tip_text: Independent climbers attempting a new line on the Mariano Moreno glacier; camp at 49.4S, 73.3W; locals report unstable weather, window potentially on Apr 16–19.
Rally drivers testing an unpermitted stage near Erg Chebbi; unpredictable authorities; some night driving planned.
Sherpa friend says an unclimbed spur is being scouted near Chukhung; icefall risk high; team sets off at dawn on Apr 16; no press allowed yet, but open to one embedded reporter if discreet.
Cavers found a recently opened cenote near Valladolid; access via ranch road; delicate stalactites; local community wants careful coverage.
Late thaw on a tributary near McGrath; swift water expected; bush pilot can drop two people if weather holds.
Volcanic field trek planned by scientists to sample fresh lava crust near Grindavík; safety escort available; shooting drone footage may be restricted.
